title: FLI product vision — API-first, self-hostable annotation layer (cycle 01)
rationale: Evidence: research-cycle-01.md Q1-Q3. Felt has no public REST API (Q2) → unique positioning. RN is the first committed consumer (persona 1 switch trigger). Storyteller persona validates the Felt-aligned UI work already done (12/14 promises shipped). Integrator persona validates the /api/v1/ versioning + SDK work queued next.
